title: FunTime My Big Tape Measure, Educational Toy for 36+ Months, Extends to 100 cm, Green
features: Measures up to 36 inches or 100 centimetres
With carrying handle and rewind knob that clicks when turned
description: Product Description The Fun Time my big tape measure measures in both inches and centimetres, up to 36 inches and 100 cm. With a chunky carrying handle and rewind knob that clicks when turned. Helps to boost maths and measuring skills. This product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 3 years and upwards. Safety Warning not appropriate for children under the age of 3. Choking Hazard - Small Parts Box Contains 1 x My Big Tape Measure See more
